channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Forecasters cite ‘dangerous’ conditions as heat scorches Midwest while on its way to the East
item.description: It’s a hot one for millions of people in the Midwest and Great Lakes states. Intense heat and humidity are baking the regions with no immediate relief. The National Weather Service says conditions are “dangerous.” The heat index is exceeding 100 degrees in some areas. The heat index is how hot it fe

item.title: Trump administration seeks to stomp out all fires quickly, reviving policy that has been discredited
California bans ‘sell by’ food labels to cut food waste and confusion
